name: Vigil — Postop & Postpartum Sentinel
description: Continuously monitors postoperative and postpartum patients for deterioration. Runs MEWT, qSOFA, and CDC ASE screens against FHIR vitals and labs. Drafts SBAR escalation notes for clinician review.

extensions.description: FHIR context allowing the agent to query a FHIR server securely. Vigil reads the context from A2A message metadata under any key containing the substring 'fhir-context' and translates {fhirUrl, fhirToken, patientId} into the three SHARP HTTP headers (x-fhir-server-url, x-fhir-access-token, x-patient-id) when calling its MCP tools.

skills.name: Screen vitals for early-warning thresholds
skills.description: Runs MEWT against the patient's most recent vitals. Returns triggered/not, breach list with severity, narrative summary.

skills.name: Score deterioration risk
skills.description: Computes qSOFA and a composite deterioration band (low/moderate/high). Returns score, rationale, and contributing signals.

skills.name: Check for sepsis onset
skills.description: Applies CDC Adult Sepsis Event criteria (SIRS + infection + organ dysfunction). Returns suspicion verdict with cited evidence.

skills.name: Draft SBAR escalation note
skills.description: Combines all three screens with the LLM-drafted Situation/Background/Assessment/Recommendation handoff. Returns the prose for clinician review.

skills.name: Start autonomous watching
skills.description: Begins background monitoring for the named patient. Optional. Demo-only.

apiKeySecurityScheme.name: X-API-Key
apiKeySecurityScheme.description: API key required to access this agent.
